topic: Deploy resources using ARM templates and Bicep files
key_facts:
Deploying Azure resources by using the Azure portal usually involves two steps:

 
 Create a resource group.

Create a resource group

 
 To create a new resource group, select Resource groups from the Azure portal .
For all types, you must select a destination resource group.

Note

 The portal interface doesn't support referencing a secret from a Key Vault .

Deploy resources with ARM templates and Azure portal

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Feedback 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Summarize this article for me
 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 Learn how to use the Azure portal with Azure Resource Manager templates (ARM templates) to deploy your Azure resources.
To learn about managing your resources, see Manage Azure resources by using the Azure portal .

Select or enter the following property values:

 
 Subscription : Select an Azure subscription.
